parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as pending_count, COALESCE(json_agg(topic ORDER BY created_at DESC), '[]'::json) as recent_topics FROM social_posts WHERE status = 'approved' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5",
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "system": "You are the content strategist for MaxPromo Digital, an AI automation agency based in Germany.

MaxPromo Digital builds:
- AI automation systems and agents
- Custom business platforms and OS
- Web development and SaaS products
- Workflow automation with n8n
- API integrations
- AI chatbots and assistants

Target audience:
- Small and medium business owners
- Entrepreneurs and founders
- Trade businesses (Handwerk)
- Service companies (cleaning, care, restaurants, medical, legal)
- Developers and agency owners

Content pillars (rotate between):
- Educational: explain how AI/automation works
- Case study: real results from real builds
- Tip: one actionable insight
- ROI/cost: what manual work actually costs
- CTA: drive to audit or estimate page

Sectors to rotate through:
professional_services, cleaning, healthcare, trade, restaurant, education, logistics, retail, legal, real_estate, ngo, technology

Always end posts with a CTA to:
maxpromo.digital/automation-audit
OR maxpromo.digital/estimate

Return ONLY valid JSON array. No markdown. No explanation. No backticks. Just the raw JSON array.",
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": "Generate exactly {{ $json.needed }} social media post topics for Facebook.

Recent topics already used (do NOT repeat these):
{{ $json.recentTopics.join(', ') }}

Return a JSON array of exactly {{ $json.needed }} objects:
[
  {
    "topic": "specific post topic",
    "sector": "one of the sectors above",
    "content_type": "educational|case_study|tip|stat|cta",
    "scheduled_window": "MORNING|AFTERNOON|EVENING|ANY"
  }
]

Vary sectors and content types. Make topics specific and valuable. No generic topics. Return ONLY the JSON array."
  }]
}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO social_posts (topic, sector, content_type, platform, status, scheduled_window) VALUES ('{{ $json.topic.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.sector }}', '{{ $json.content_type }}', 'facebook', 'approved', '{{ $json.scheduled_window }}')
